# How to Find and Fix Broken Links in WordPress

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-08-09 13:34:13
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 990

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Today, I'd like to share with you an easy way to detect broken
links on your WordPress site as soon as they appear.

The harsh reality is that most website owners only discover
broken links by accident or when someone complains.

By the time you notice broken links, you've already lost visitors
and potentially damaged your search engine rankings.

It doesn't have to be that way.

So I asked my team to publish a guide to stay on top of 404
errors without constantly monitoring your site. Go ahead and read
the tutorial 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..2iT4Mot0KUWGzaV9Cxy3Q7Vy13DcIAUXsQllw2W9--Q )
 here!

And let me know your thoughts by replying to this email :)

What’s Next?
------------

While broken links hurt user experience and search rankings,
they’re just one piece of the SEO puzzle.

To really move the needle, you need to look at your site’s
overall health... from how your pages are structured to how your
content is optimized.

That’s why we put together our complete WordPress SEO guide 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..iZP8gpfIdsNfa4-EjbplSBiEfq0KXZYoqMR57zq38_Y ), a step-by-step
playbook for getting more traffic and better rankings.

It covers everything from keyword research to technical SEO, so
you know exactly what to focus on next.

Turn 404 Pages into Opportunities
---------------------------------

Even with regular maintenance, some visitors will still land on a
missing page.

That’s why a well-designed 404 page is so important. A 404 page
turns a dead end into a chance to keep people browsing.

With the free version of SeedProd 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.2RMcxQyZ4XDsizebODOIS02Ze7lrh9CsRUFz2_a1igY ), you can easily
create a custom 404 page with your branding and helpful links.

And if you ever want to take it further, the premium version 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..9seSi6SyTer_yUvZvXl6H5T7MpWXQ-JaMJpp-rMVp68 ) lets you add advanced features like
opt-in forms, product showcases, or seasonal promotions. It can
turn lost traffic into loyal visitors.

Talk soon,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
